content: Hello
Hello, how can I help you?
Need help with a leave request.
Employees request time off using the NestHR portal by navigating to the “Leave & Availability” tab. Requests must be submitted at least 10 days in advance.
string

Assistant would answered your question with CONTEXT:
Employees request time off using the NestHR portal by navigating to the “Leave & Availability” tab. Requests must be submitted at least 10 days in advance. Approval is typically granted within 3 business days by the team lead or store manager. Emergency leave can be requested by phone or in person. Each employee receives 20 paid leave days per year, prorated by contract length. BrewNest offers a 10% discount to corporate partners who sign up through the Business Brew program. Companies with over 30 employees can register to receive digital discount cards for staff. The program also includes catering options and early access to seasonal items. To register, HR representatives can contact biz@brewnest.eu with their company name, tax ID, and estimated number of users.

Assistant would answered your question with CONTEXT:
Interested candidates can apply for a position at BrewNest through the official careers page at careers.brewnest.eu. Applications require a short form, résumé upload, and optional cover letter. Positions range from barista and store manager to corporate roles in marketing and logistics. Applicants are contacted within 7 working days. Internal candidates can apply through NestHR for faster processing. Employees request time off using the NestHR portal by navigating to the “Leave & Availability” tab. Requests must be submitted at least 10 days in advance. Approval is typically granted within 3 business days by the team lead or store manager. Emergency leave can be requested by phone or in person. Each employee receives 20 paid leave days per year, prorated by contract length.

Assistant would answered your question with CONTEXT:
BrewNest offers a 10% discount to corporate partners who sign up through the Business Brew program. Companies with over 30 employees can register to receive digital discount cards for staff. The program also includes catering options and early access to seasonal items. To register, HR representatives can contact biz@brewnest.eu with their company name, tax ID, and estimated number of users. BrewNest employees are required to wear black pants or jeans, closed-toe shoes, and the official BrewNest shirt provided at onboarding. Aprons and name tags are distributed by store managers. Hair must be tied back, and visible piercings are limited to ears and nose studs. Uniforms must be clean and wrinkle-free. Replacement shirts can be requested once every six months via NestHR.

Assistant would answered your question with CONTEXT:
The BrewNest App is available on Android and iOS and lets customers collect points with every purchase. One point is earned per €1 spent, and 30 points unlock a free drink. The app also includes mobile ordering, exclusive discounts, and a birthday reward. Points expire after 12 months of inactivity. The app can be linked to Google Pay or Apple Wallet for faster checkout. Interested candidates can apply for a position at BrewNest through the official careers page at careers.brewnest.eu. Applications require a short form, résumé upload, and optional cover letter. Positions range from barista and store manager to corporate roles in marketing and logistics. Applicants are contacted within 7 working days. Internal candidates can apply through NestHR for faster processing.
ewf wefwwe

Assistant would answered your question with CONTEXT:
BrewNest employees are required to wear black pants or jeans, closed-toe shoes, and the official BrewNest shirt provided at onboarding. Aprons and name tags are distributed by store managers. Hair must be tied back, and visible piercings are limited to ears and nose studs. Uniforms must be clean and wrinkle-free. Replacement shirts can be requested once every six months via NestHR. Employees at BrewNest can access their digital pay stubs through the company's internal HR portal, called NestHR. The portal is available at nesthr.brewnest.eu and requires a company email login. New employees receive their credentials during onboarding. Pay stubs are uploaded on the 27th of each month, and past records are stored for up to 24 months. If employees forget their password, they can reset it via SMS or by contacting HR directly at hr@brewnest.eu. In-store team leads can also print pay summaries using the staff tablet under the “Admin Tools” section. Paper copies are no longer distributed starting March 2025.
